narrative:
Mercer County has 28,853 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.9% of registrants.
